home.title:
Mobile
Developer
home.subtitle: I like to craft innovative and scalable mobile products with great user experiences.
home.skill1: Highly skilled at progressive enhancement, design systems & UI Engineering.
home.skill2: Over a three years of experience building products for clients across Japan and Vietnam.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: I have the ideal tools for developing mobile applications, and I can definitely work without them to produce quick, durable solutions that are designed for growth – performance and scalability are top objectives on my radar.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Besides mobile development, I also enjoy working on web projects, sometimes as a Frontend developer and occasionally as a Backend developer. Although I'm not an expert in this field, I am very passionate about it.

build.title:
I build &
design stuff
build.description: Open source projects, mobile apps and experimentals.

experience.title: Over the years,
experience.description: I build applications for both companies and personal projects, ranging from travel and food apps with a focus on user interface to AI applications for fitness and health with complex effects and logic, serving people all over Japan. Currently, I work at Sun* as a mobile engineer in the growth team.

thankYou.message: Creating Mobile Solutions That Not Only Meet But Exceed Your Expectations.
thankYou.title: Thank for your watching!

apps.title: My Apps
apps.subtitle: Explore the applications I've built and published on major app stores.

health_tracker.name: Health Tracker
health_tracker.terms_of_use:
Health Tracker Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

1. Health Data
This app collects health data for tracking purposes. Your data is stored locally on your device unless you choose to sync with cloud services.

2. User Agreement
By using this app, you agree to use it only for personal health tracking purposes.

3. Liability
The app provides health insights for informational purposes only and should not be considered as medical advice.

food_delivery.name: Food Delivery Pro
food_delivery.terms_of_use:
Food Delivery Pro Terms of Service

1. Service Description
Food Delivery Pro connects customers with local food stores for delivery services.

2. User Responsibilities
Users agree to provide accurate information and use the service legally and responsibly.

3. Limitation of Liability
We are not responsible for food quality or delivery delays caused by third parties.

drama_stream.name: Drama Stream
drama_stream.terms_of_use:
Drama Stream Terms of Use

1. Content License
All content in Drama Stream is licensed for personal, non-commercial use only.

2. Restrictions
You may not reproduce, distribute, or transmit any content without permission.

3. Account Termination
We reserve the right to terminate accounts violating these terms.

sleep_analytics.name: Sleep Analytics
sleep_analytics.terms_of_use:
Sleep Analytics Privacy Policy and Terms

1. Data Privacy
Sleep data is stored securely and never shared with third parties without your consent.

2. Health Information
This app is not a medical device and should not replace professional medical advice.

3. User Consent
By using this app, you consent to data collection for improving the service.

pachinko_master.name: Pachinko Master
pachinko_master.terms_of_use:
Pachinko Master Terms of Service

1. Game License
This game is provided for entertainment purposes only.

2. In-App Purchases
All purchases are final and non-refundable except as required by law.

3. Fair Play
Multiplayer features must be used fairly. Cheating or exploiting bugs is prohibited.

retail_navigator.name: Retail Navigator
retail_navigator.terms_of_use:
Retail Navigator Terms and Privacy Policy

1. Location Data
This app uses Bluetooth beacon technology to determine your location within stores. Location data is processed locally and not stored permanently.

2. Store Partnership
Retail Navigator works with partner stores. Terms vary by store.

3. Accuracy Disclaimer
Location accuracy depends on beacon availability and environmental factors.
